query: SELECT equip_id, name, slot, tier, rarity, hp_bonus, attack_bonus, defense_bonus, speed_bonus, resist_bonus FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE hp_bonus > 0 OR attack_bonus > 0 OR defense_bonus > 0 OR speed_bonus > 0 ORDER BY tier, rarity LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT equip_id, name, slot, tier, rarity, hp_bonus, attack_bonus, defense_bonus, speed_bonus, resist_bonus FROM game_equipment_catalog WHERE hp_bonus > 0 OR attack_bonus > 0 OR defense_bonus > 0 OR speed_bonus > 0 ORDER BY tier, rarity LIMIT 10;
